description: Address review issues #1 and #4: Add cache invalidation assertions to calendar hook tests, and add boundary transition tests for formatRelativeTime.
steps: Add cache invalidation spy assertions to useCreateEvent, useUpdateEvent, useDeleteEvent, useCreateCalendar, useUpdateCalendar, and useDeleteCalendar tests in apps/quantcalendar/src/__tests__/hooks.test.ts. Follow the pattern from quantmeet useJoinRoom test: create a separate QueryClient, spy on invalidateQueries, and assert it was called with the correct queryKey after mutation.

Add boundary transition test cases to the formatRelativeTime describe block in packages/common/src/__tests__/utils.test.ts: 59 seconds -> just now, 60 seconds -> 1m ago, 6 days -> 6d ago, 7 days -> 1w ago, 29 days -> 4w ago, 30 days -> 1mo ago.
acceptance_criteria: Each calendar mutation hook test verifies invalidateQueries is called with correct queryKey on success
formatRelativeTime tests include boundary transition cases at 59s/60s, 6d/7d, 29d/30d
